    type Response request;
}

data JsonRpcRequest
JsonRpcRequest :: Text -> Maybe Value -> Maybe Value -> JsonRpcRequest

[result] :: JsonRpcResponse -> Maybe Value
[error] :: JsonRpcResponse -> Maybe JsonRpcError

[code] :: JsonRpcError -> {-# UNPACK #-}Int
[message] :: JsonRpcError -> Text

data UserClaims
UserClaims :: Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Array Text -> Maybe Text -> Map Text Value -> UserClaims
[sub] :: UserClaims -> Text
[email] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text
[name] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text
[permissions] :: UserClaims -> Array Text
[tenantId] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text

Unauthenticated :: AccessError
Forbidden :: AccessError
InsufficientPermissions :: Array Text -> AccessError

AuthorizationError :: AccessError -> QueryEndpointError
StorageError :: Text -> QueryEndpointError

requirePermission :: Text -> Maybe UserClaims -> Maybe AccessError
requireAnyPermission :: Array Text -> Maybe UserClaims -> Maybe AccessError
requireAllPermissions :: Array Text -> Maybe UserClaims -> Maybe AccessError
publicAccess :: Maybe UserClaims -> Maybe AccessError

module Service.SnapshotCache.Core

[get] :: SnapshotCache state -> EntityName -> StreamId -> Task Error (Maybe (Snapshot state))
[set] :: SnapshotCache state -> Snapshot state -> Task Error Unit

module Service.Event
data Event eventType
Event :: EntityName -> StreamId -> eventType -> EventMetadata -> Event eventType
[entityName] :: Event eventType -> EntityName
[streamId] :: Event eventType -> StreamId
[event] :: Event eventType -> eventType
[metadata] :: Event eventType -> EventMetadata
data InsertionPayload eventType
InsertionPayload :: StreamId -> EntityName -> InsertionType -> Array (Insertion eventType) -> InsertionPayload eventType
[streamId] :: InsertionPayload eventType -> StreamId
[entityName] :: InsertionPayload eventType -> EntityName
[insertionType] :: InsertionPayload eventType -> InsertionType
[insertions] :: InsertionPayload eventType -> Array (Insertion eventType)
newtype StreamId
StreamId :: Text -> StreamId
class ToStreamId idType
toStreamId :: ToStreamId idType => idType -> StreamId
newtype StreamPosition
StreamPosition :: Int64 -> StreamPosition
newtype EntityName
EntityName :: Text -> EntityName
data InsertionType
StreamCreation :: InsertionType
InsertAfter :: StreamPosition -> InsertionType
ExistingStream :: InsertionType
AnyStreamState :: InsertionType
data Insertion eventType
Insertion :: Uuid -> eventType -> EventMetadata -> Insertion eventType
[id] :: Insertion eventType -> Uuid
[event] :: Insertion eventType -> eventType
[metadata] :: Insertion eventType -> EventMetadata
data InsertionSuccess
InsertionSuccess :: StreamPosition -> StreamPosition -> InsertionSuccess
[globalPosition] :: InsertionSuccess -> StreamPosition
[localPosition] :: InsertionSuccess -> StreamPosition
data InsertionFailure
ConsistencyCheckFailed :: InsertionFailure
InsertionFailed :: Text -> InsertionFailure
PayloadTooLarge :: InsertionFailure
EmptyPayload :: InsertionFailure
payloadFromEvents :: EntityName -> StreamId -> Array eventType -> Task w (InsertionPayload eventType)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq eventType => GHC.Classes.Eq (Service.Event.Event eventType)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq eventType => GHC.Classes.Eq (Service.Event.Insertion eventType)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Event.InsertionFailure
instance GHC.Classes.Eq eventType => GHC.Classes.Eq (Service.Event.InsertionPayload eventType)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Event.InsertionSuccess
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Event.InsertionType
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON eventType => Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON (Service.Event.Event eventType)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Service.Event.Event eventType)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Service.Event.Insertion eventType)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.Event.InsertionFailure
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Service.Event.InsertionPayload eventType)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.Event.InsertionSuccess
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.Event.InsertionType
instance GHC.Classes.Ord eventType => GHC.Classes.Ord (Service.Event.Event eventType)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord eventType => GHC.Classes.Ord (Service.Event.Insertion eventType)

instance GHC.Classes.Ord eventType => GHC.Classes.Ord (Service.Event.InsertionPayload eventType)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Service.Event.InsertionSuccess
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Service.Event.InsertionType

instance GHC.Show.Show eventType => GHC.Show.Show (Service.Event.Insertion eventType)

module Service.EventStore.Core
data EventStore eventType
EventStore :: (InsertionPayload eventType -> Task Error InsertionSuccess) -> (EntityName -> StreamId -> StreamPosition -> Limit -> Task Error (Stream (ReadStreamMessage eventType))) -> (EntityName -> StreamId -> StreamPosition -> Limit -> Task Error (Stream (ReadStreamMessage eventType))) -> (EntityName -> StreamId -> Task Error (Stream (ReadStreamMessage eventType))) -> (StreamPosition -> Limit -> Task Error (Stream (ReadAllMessage eventType))) -> (StreamPosition -> Limit -> Task Error (Stream (ReadAllMessage eventType))) -> (StreamPosition -> Limit -> Array EntityName -> Task Error (Stream (ReadAllMessage eventType))) -> (StreamPosition -> Limit -> Array EntityName -> Task Error (Stream (ReadAllMessage eventType))) -> ((Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId) -> (StreamPosition -> (Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId) -> ((Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId) -> (EntityName -> (Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId) -> (EntityName -> StreamId -> (Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId) -> (SubscriptionId -> Task Error Unit) -> (EntityName -> StreamId -> StreamPosition -> Task Error Unit) -> Task Text Unit -> EventStore eventType
[insert] :: EventStore eventType -> InsertionPayload eventType -> Task Error InsertionSuccess
[readStreamForwardFrom] :: EventStore eventType -> EntityName -> StreamId -> StreamPosition -> Limit -> Task Error (Stream (ReadStreamMessage eventType))
[readStreamBackwardFrom] :: EventStore eventType -> EntityName -> StreamId -> StreamPosition -> Limit -> Task Error (Stream (ReadStreamMessage eventType))
[readAllStreamEvents] :: EventStore eventType -> EntityName -> StreamId -> Task Error (Stream (ReadStreamMessage eventType))
[readAllEventsForwardFrom] :: EventStore eventType -> StreamPosition -> Limit -> Task Error (Stream (ReadAllMessage eventType))
[readAllEventsBackwardFrom] :: EventStore eventType -> StreamPosition -> Limit -> Task Error (Stream (ReadAllMessage eventType))
[readAllEventsForwardFromFiltered] :: EventStore eventType -> StreamPosition -> Limit -> Array EntityName -> Task Error (Stream (ReadAllMessage eventType))
[readAllEventsBackwardFromFiltered] :: EventStore eventType -> StreamPosition -> Limit -> Array EntityName -> Task Error (Stream (ReadAllMessage eventType))
[subscribeToAllEvents] :: EventStore eventType -> (Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId
[subscribeToAllEventsFromPosition] :: EventStore eventType -> StreamPosition -> (Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId
[subscribeToAllEventsFromStart] :: EventStore eventType -> (Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId
[subscribeToEntityEvents] :: EventStore eventType -> EntityName -> (Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId
[subscribeToStreamEvents] :: EventStore eventType -> EntityName -> StreamId -> (Event eventType -> Task Text Unit) -> Task Error SubscriptionId
[unsubscribe] :: EventStore eventType -> SubscriptionId -> Task Error Unit
[truncateStream] :: EventStore eventType -> EntityName -> StreamId -> StreamPosition -> Task Error Unit
[close] :: EventStore eventType -> Task Text Unit
data Error
StreamNotFound :: EntityName -> StreamId -> Error
EventNotFound :: StreamId -> StreamPosition -> Error
StorageFailure :: Text -> Error
SubscriptionNotFound :: SubscriptionId -> Error
SubscriptionError :: SubscriptionId -> Text -> Error
TruncationError :: EntityName -> StreamId -> StreamPosition -> Text -> Error
InsertionError :: InsertionFailure -> Error
ReadingAllError :: Text -> Error
newtype Limit
Limit :: Int64 -> Limit
newtype SubscriptionId
SubscriptionId :: Text -> SubscriptionId
data ReadAllMessage eventType
ReadingStarted :: ReadAllMessage eventType
AllEvent :: Event eventType -> ReadAllMessage eventType
ToxicAllEvent :: ToxicContents -> ReadAllMessage eventType
Checkpoint :: StreamPosition -> ReadAllMessage eventType
Terminated :: Text -> ReadAllMessage eventType
CaughtUp :: ReadAllMessage eventType
FellBehind :: ReadAllMessage eventType
data ReadStreamMessage eventType
StreamReadingStarted :: ReadStreamMessage eventType
StreamEvent :: Event eventType -> ReadStreamMessage eventType
ToxicStreamEvent :: ToxicContents -> ReadStreamMessage eventType
StreamCheckpoint :: StreamPosition -> ReadStreamMessage eventType
StreamTerminated :: Text -> ReadStreamMessage eventType
StreamCaughtUp :: ReadStreamMessage eventType
StreamFellBehind :: ReadStreamMessage eventType
data ToxicContents
ToxicContents :: Text -> Value -> StreamPosition -> StreamPosition -> Text -> ToxicContents
[locator] :: ToxicContents -> Text
[metadata] :: ToxicContents -> Value
[globalPosition] :: ToxicContents -> StreamPosition
[localPosition] :: ToxicContents -> StreamPosition
[additionalInfo] :: ToxicContents -> Text
class EventStoreConfig config
createEventStore :: EventStoreConfig config => config -> Task Text (EventStore Value)
collectAllEvents :: Array (ReadAllMessage eventType) -> Array (Event eventType)
collectStreamEvents :: Array (ReadStreamMessage eventType) -> Array (Event eventType)
streamMessageToAllMessage :: ReadStreamMessage eventType -> ReadAllMessage eventType
castEventStore :: (FromJSON eventType, ToJSON eventType) => EventStore Value -> EventStore eventType
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.EventStore.Core.Error
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.EventStore.Core.Limit
instance GHC.Classes.Eq eventType => GHC.Classes.Eq (Service.EventStore.Core.ReadAllMessage eventType)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq eventType => GHC.Classes.Eq (Service.EventStore.Core.ReadStreamMessage eventType)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.EventStore.Core.SubscriptionId
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.EventStore.Core.ToxicContents
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.EventStore.Core.Limit
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Service.EventStore.Core.ReadStreamMessage eventType)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.EventStore.Core.SubscriptionId
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Service.EventStore.Core.Limit
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Service.EventStore.Core.SubscriptionId
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.EventStore.Core.Error
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.EventStore.Core.Limit
instance GHC.Show.Show eventType => GHC.Show.Show (Service.EventStore.Core.ReadAllMessage eventType)
instance GHC.Show.Show eventType => GHC.Show.Show (Service.EventStore.Core.ReadStreamMessage eventType)
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.EventStore.Core.SubscriptionId
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.EventStore.Core.ToxicContents

module Service.EntityFetcher.Core
data EntityFetcher state (event :: k)
EntityFetcher :: (EntityName -> StreamId -> Task Error (EntityFetchResult state)) -> EntityFetcher state (event :: k)
[fetch] :: EntityFetcher state (event :: k) -> EntityName -> StreamId -> Task Error (EntityFetchResult state)
data EntityFetchResult state
EntityNotFound :: EntityFetchResult state
EntityFound :: FetchedEntity state -> EntityFetchResult state
data FetchedEntity state
FetchedEntity :: state -> Maybe StreamPosition -> FetchedEntity state
[state] :: FetchedEntity state -> state
[lastPosition] :: FetchedEntity state -> Maybe StreamPosition
data Error
EventStoreError :: Error -> Error
ReductionError :: Text -> Error
CacheError :: Error -> Error
new :: forall state event. EventStore event -> state -> (event -> state -> state) -> Task Error (EntityFetcher state event)
newWithCache :: forall state event. EventStore event -> SnapshotCache state -> state -> (event -> state -> state) -> Task Error (EntityFetcher state event)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq state => GHC.Classes.Eq (Service.EntityFetcher.Core.EntityFetchResult state)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.EntityFetcher.Core.Error
instance GHC.Classes.Eq state => GHC.Classes.Eq (Service.EntityFetcher.Core.FetchedEntity state)
instance GHC.Show.Show state => GHC.Show.Show (Service.EntityFetcher.Core.EntityFetchResult state)
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.EntityFetcher.Core.Error
instance GHC.Show.Show state => GHC.Show.Show (Service.EntityFetcher.Core.FetchedEntity state)

module Service.EntityFetcher

module Service.Entity.Core
class Entity entity where {
    -- | The type of identifier used for this entity.
    --   
    --   Defaults to <a>Uuid</a> but can be overridden for entities that use
    --   different ID types.
    type EntityIdType entity;
    type EntityIdType entity = Uuid;
}
initialStateImpl :: Entity entity => entity
updateImpl :: Entity entity => EventOf entity -> entity -> entity
class Event event
getEventEntityIdImpl :: Event event => event -> EntityIdType (EntityOf event)
type family EntityOf command
type family EventOf entityType

module Service.Query.Core
data QueryAction query
Update :: query -> QueryAction query
Delete :: QueryAction query
NoOp :: QueryAction query
class Query query
canAccessImpl :: Query query => Maybe UserClaims -> Maybe AccessError
canViewImpl :: Query query => Maybe UserClaims -> query -> Maybe AccessError
maxResultsImpl :: Query query => Int
class (Entity entity, Query query) => QueryOf entity query
queryId :: QueryOf entity query => entity -> Uuid
combine :: QueryOf entity query => entity -> Maybe query -> QueryAction query
type family EntitiesOf query :: [Type]
instance GHC.Classes.Eq query => GHC.Classes.Eq (Service.Query.Core.QueryAction query)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Service.Query.Core.QueryAction query)
instance GHC.Show.Show query => GHC.Show.Show (Service.Query.Core.QueryAction query)

module Service.Query.Updater
createUpdater :: (Entity entity, Query query, QueryOf entity query, FromJSON (EventOf entity)) => Text -> EntityFetcher entity (EventOf entity) -> QueryObjectStore query -> QueryUpdater

module Service.Query.Endpoint
createQueryEndpoint :: (ToJSON query, Query query) => QueryObjectStore query -> Maybe UserClaims -> Maybe Expr -> QueryPageRequest -> Task QueryEndpointError Text

module Service.Query

module Service.Entity

module Service.FileUpload.Core
newtype FileRef
FileRef :: Text -> FileRef
newtype BlobKey
BlobKey :: Text -> BlobKey
newtype OwnerHash
OwnerHash :: Text -> OwnerHash
newtype ContentHash
ContentHash :: Text -> ContentHash
data FileMetadata
FileMetadata :: Text -> Text -> Int64 -> FileMetadata
[filename] :: FileMetadata -> Text
[contentType] :: FileMetadata -> Text
[sizeBytes] :: FileMetadata -> Int64
data ResolvedFile
ResolvedFile :: FileRef -> FileMetadata -> BlobKey -> Int64 -> ResolvedFile
[ref] :: ResolvedFile -> FileRef
[metadata] :: ResolvedFile -> FileMetadata
[blobKey] :: ResolvedFile -> BlobKey
[uploadedAt] :: ResolvedFile -> Int64
data FileAccessError
FileNotFound :: FileRef -> FileAccessError
StateLookupFailed :: FileRef -> Text -> FileAccessError
NotOwner :: FileRef -> FileAccessError
FileExpired :: FileRef -> FileAccessError
FileIsDeleted :: FileRef -> FileAccessError
BlobMissing :: FileRef -> FileAccessError
StorageError :: Text -> FileAccessError
data FileUploadEvent
FileUploaded :: FileUploadedData -> FileUploadEvent
FileConfirmed :: FileConfirmedData -> FileUploadEvent
FileDeleted :: FileDeletedData -> FileUploadEvent
data FileUploadedData
FileUploadedData :: FileRef -> OwnerHash -> ContentHash -> Text -> Text -> Int64 -> BlobKey -> Int64 -> Int64 -> FileUploadedData
[fileRef] :: FileUploadedData -> FileRef
[ownerHash] :: FileUploadedData -> OwnerHash
[contentHash] :: FileUploadedData -> ContentHash
[filename] :: FileUploadedData -> Text
[contentType] :: FileUploadedData -> Text
[sizeBytes] :: FileUploadedData -> Int64
[blobKey] :: FileUploadedData -> BlobKey
[expiresAt] :: FileUploadedData -> Int64
[uploadedAt] :: FileUploadedData -> Int64
data FileConfirmedData
FileConfirmedData :: FileRef -> Text -> Int64 -> FileConfirmedData
[fileRef] :: FileConfirmedData -> FileRef
[confirmedByRequestId] :: FileConfirmedData -> Text
[confirmedAt] :: FileConfirmedData -> Int64
data FileDeletedData
FileDeletedData :: FileRef -> FileDeletionReason -> Int64 -> FileDeletedData
[fileRef] :: FileDeletedData -> FileRef
[reason] :: FileDeletedData -> FileDeletionReason
[deletedAt] :: FileDeletedData -> Int64
data FileDeletionReason
Orphaned :: FileDeletionReason
UserRequested :: FileDeletionReason
AdminPurge :: FileDeletionReason
data FileUploadConfig
FileUploadConfig :: Text -> FileStateStoreBackend -> Int64 -> Int64 -> Int64 -> Maybe (Array Text) -> Bool -> FileUploadConfig
[blobStoreDir] :: FileUploadConfig -> Text
[stateStoreBackend] :: FileUploadConfig -> FileStateStoreBackend
[maxFileSizeBytes] :: FileUploadConfig -> Int64
[pendingTtlSeconds] :: FileUploadConfig -> Int64
[cleanupIntervalSeconds] :: FileUploadConfig -> Int64
[allowedContentTypes] :: FileUploadConfig -> Maybe (Array Text)
[storeOriginalFilename] :: FileUploadConfig -> Bool
data FileStateStoreBackend
InMemoryStateStore :: FileStateStoreBackend
PostgresStateStore :: Text -> Int -> Text -> Text -> Text -> SslMode -> Maybe Text -> FileStateStoreBackend
[pgHost] :: FileStateStoreBackend -> Text
[pgPort] :: FileStateStoreBackend -> Int
[pgDatabase] :: FileStateStoreBackend -> Text
[pgUser] :: FileStateStoreBackend -> Text
[pgPassword] :: FileStateStoreBackend -> Text
[pgSslMode] :: FileStateStoreBackend -> SslMode
[pgSslRootCert] :: FileStateStoreBackend -> Maybe Text
data InternalFileUploadConfig
InternalFileUploadConfig :: Int64 -> Int64 -> Int64 -> Maybe (Array Text) -> Bool -> InternalFileUploadConfig
[pendingTtlSeconds] :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> Int64
[cleanupIntervalSeconds] :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> Int64
[maxFileSizeBytes] :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> Int64
[allowedContentTypes] :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> Maybe (Array Text)
[storeOriginalFilename] :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> Bool
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.BlobKey
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.ContentHash
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.FileAccessError
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.FileConfirmedData
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.FileDeletedData
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.FileDeletionReason
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.FileMetadata

instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.FileUploadConfig

instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.FileUploadedData
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.InternalFileUploadConfig

instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Core.ResolvedFile

instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Service.FileUpload.Core.FileDeletedData
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Service.FileUpload.Core.FileDeletionReason

instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Service.FileUpload.Core.FileRef
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Service.FileUpload.Core.FileStateStoreBackend

module Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle
data FileUploadState
Initial :: FileUploadState
Pending :: PendingFile -> FileUploadState
Confirmed :: ConfirmedFile -> FileUploadState
Deleted :: FileUploadState
data PendingFile
PendingFile :: FileMetadata -> OwnerHash -> Int64 -> PendingFile
[metadata] :: PendingFile -> FileMetadata
[ownerHash] :: PendingFile -> OwnerHash
[expiresAt] :: PendingFile -> Int64
data ConfirmedFile
ConfirmedFile :: FileMetadata -> OwnerHash -> Text -> ConfirmedFile
[metadata] :: ConfirmedFile -> FileMetadata
[ownerHash] :: ConfirmedFile -> OwnerHash
[confirmedByRequestId] :: ConfirmedFile -> Text
data FileMetadata
FileMetadata :: FileRef -> Text -> Text -> Int64 -> BlobKey -> Int64 -> ContentHash -> FileMetadata
[ref] :: FileMetadata -> FileRef
[filename] :: FileMetadata -> Text
[contentType] :: FileMetadata -> Text
[sizeBytes] :: FileMetadata -> Int64
[blobKey] :: FileMetadata -> BlobKey
[uploadedAt] :: FileMetadata -> Int64
[contentHash] :: FileMetadata -> ContentHash
update :: FileUploadEvent -> FileUploadState -> FileUploadState
initialState :: FileUploadState
canConfirm :: FileUploadState -> Int64 -> Bool
isExpired :: FileUploadState -> Int64 -> Bool
canDelete :: FileUploadState -> Bool
getOwnerHash :: FileUploadState -> Maybe OwnerHash
getBlobKey :: FileUploadState -> Maybe BlobKey
getMetadata :: FileUploadState -> Maybe FileMetadata
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.ConfirmedFile
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.FileMetadata
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.FileUploadState
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.PendingFile
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.ConfirmedFile
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.FileMetadata
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.FileUploadState
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.PendingFile
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.ConfirmedFile
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.FileMetadata
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.FileUploadState
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Lifecycle.PendingFile

module Service.FileUpload.BlobStore
data BlobStore
BlobStore :: (BlobKey -> Bytes -> Task BlobStoreError Unit) -> (BlobKey -> Task BlobStoreError Bytes) -> (BlobKey -> Task BlobStoreError Unit) -> (BlobKey -> Task BlobStoreError Bool) -> BlobStore
[store] :: BlobStore -> BlobKey -> Bytes -> Task BlobStoreError Unit
[retrieve] :: BlobStore -> BlobKey -> Task BlobStoreError Bytes
[delete] :: BlobStore -> BlobKey -> Task BlobStoreError Unit
[exists] :: BlobStore -> BlobKey -> Task BlobStoreError Bool
data BlobStoreError
NotFound :: BlobKey -> BlobStoreError
StorageError :: Text -> BlobStoreError
InvalidBlobKey :: Text -> BlobStoreError
newtype BlobKey
BlobKey :: Text -> BlobKey
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.BlobStore.BlobStoreError
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.BlobStore.BlobStoreError
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.BlobStore.BlobStoreError

module Service.FileUpload.Routes
data UploadRequest
UploadRequest :: Text -> Text -> Bytes -> Text -> UploadRequest
[filename] :: UploadRequest -> Text
[contentType] :: UploadRequest -> Text
[content] :: UploadRequest -> Bytes
[ownerHash] :: UploadRequest -> Text
data UploadResponse
UploadResponse :: FileRef -> BlobKey -> Text -> Text -> Int64 -> DateTime -> UploadResponse
[fileRef] :: UploadResponse -> FileRef
[blobKey] :: UploadResponse -> BlobKey
[filename] :: UploadResponse -> Text
[contentType] :: UploadResponse -> Text
[sizeBytes] :: UploadResponse -> Int64
[expiresAt] :: UploadResponse -> DateTime
data UploadError
FileTooLarge :: Int64 -> Int64 -> UploadError
[maxBytes] :: UploadError -> Int64
[actualBytes] :: UploadError -> Int64
InvalidContentType :: Text -> Array Text -> UploadError
[contentType] :: UploadError -> Text
[allowedTypes] :: UploadError -> Array Text
InvalidFilename :: Text -> UploadError
StorageFailure :: Text -> UploadError
handleUpload :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> BlobStore -> UploadRequest -> Task UploadError UploadResponse
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadError
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadRequest
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadResponse
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadError
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadError
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadRequest
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadResponse
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadError
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadRequest
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadResponse
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadError
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Service.FileUpload.Routes.UploadResponse

module Service.FileUpload.Resolver
data ResolvedFile
ResolvedFile :: FileRef -> Text -> Text -> Int64 -> DateTime -> BlobKey -> ResolvedFile
[ref] :: ResolvedFile -> FileRef
[filename] :: ResolvedFile -> Text
[contentType] :: ResolvedFile -> Text
[sizeBytes] :: ResolvedFile -> Int64
[uploadedAt] :: ResolvedFile -> DateTime
[blobKey] :: ResolvedFile -> BlobKey
type ResolveError = FileAccessError
resolveFileRef :: BlobStore -> (FileRef -> Task err (Maybe FileUploadState)) -> OwnerHash -> FileRef -> Task ResolveError ResolvedFile
resolveFileRefs :: BlobStore -> (FileRef -> Task err (Maybe FileUploadState)) -> OwnerHash -> [FileRef] -> Task ResolveError (Map FileRef ResolvedFile)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Resolver.ResolvedFile
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Service.FileUpload.Resolver.ResolvedFile
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Resolver.ResolvedFile
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Resolver.ResolvedFile
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Service.FileUpload.Resolver.ResolvedFile

module Service.FileUpload.Web
data FileUploadSetup
FileUploadSetup :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> BlobStore -> FileStateStore -> FileUploadSetup
[config] :: FileUploadSetup -> InternalFileUploadConfig
[blobStore] :: FileUploadSetup -> BlobStore
[stateStore] :: FileUploadSetup -> FileStateStore
defaultFileUploadSetup :: BlobStore -> FileStateStore -> FileUploadSetup
data FileUploadRoutes
FileUploadRoutes :: (Text -> Text -> Text -> Bytes -> Task Text UploadResponse) -> (Text -> FileRef -> Task FileAccessError (Bytes, Text, Text)) -> (Text -> [FileRef] -> Task FileAccessError (Map FileRef ResolvedFile)) -> (FileRef -> Text -> Task Text ()) -> FileUploadRoutes
[handleUpload] :: FileUploadRoutes -> Text -> Text -> Text -> Bytes -> Task Text UploadResponse
[handleDownload] :: FileUploadRoutes -> Text -> FileRef -> Task FileAccessError (Bytes, Text, Text)
[resolveFileRefs] :: FileUploadRoutes -> Text -> [FileRef] -> Task FileAccessError (Map FileRef ResolvedFile)
[confirmFile] :: FileUploadRoutes -> FileRef -> Text -> Task Text ()
createRoutes :: FileUploadSetup -> FileUploadRoutes
data FileStateStore
FileStateStore :: (FileRef -> Task Text (Maybe FileUploadState)) -> (FileRef -> FileUploadState -> Task Text ()) -> (FileRef -> FileUploadEvent -> Task Text ()) -> (OwnerHash -> ContentHash -> Task Text (Maybe FileRef)) -> FileStateStore
[getState] :: FileStateStore -> FileRef -> Task Text (Maybe FileUploadState)
[setState] :: FileStateStore -> FileRef -> FileUploadState -> Task Text ()
[updateState] :: FileStateStore -> FileRef -> FileUploadEvent -> Task Text ()
[findByContentHash] :: FileStateStore -> OwnerHash -> ContentHash -> Task Text (Maybe FileRef)
type InMemoryFileStateStore = ConcurrentMap FileRef FileUploadState
newInMemoryFileStateStore :: Task err InMemoryFileStateStore
inMemoryFileStateStore :: InMemoryFileStateStore -> FileStateStore
computeContentHash :: Bytes -> ContentHash
handleUploadImpl :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> BlobStore -> FileStateStore -> Text -> Text -> Text -> Bytes -> Task Text UploadResponse
startCleanupWorker :: InternalFileUploadConfig -> FileStateStore -> BlobStore -> InMemoryFileStateStore -> Task Text (AsyncTask Text ())
cleanupExpiredFiles :: FileStateStore -> BlobStore -> InMemoryFileStateStore -> Task Text Int

module Service.FileUpload.Download
data DownloadResponse
DownloadResponse :: Bytes -> Text -> Text -> DownloadResponse
[content] :: DownloadResponse -> Bytes
[contentType] :: DownloadResponse -> Text
[filename] :: DownloadResponse -> Text
type DownloadError = FileAccessError
handleDownload :: Show stateError => BlobStore -> (FileRef -> Task stateError (Maybe FileUploadState)) -> OwnerHash -> FileRef -> Task DownloadError DownloadResponse
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.Download.DownloadResponse
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.Download.DownloadResponse
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.Download.DownloadResponse

module Service.FileUpload.BlobStore.Local
data LocalBlobStoreConfig
LocalBlobStoreConfig :: Path -> LocalBlobStoreConfig
[rootDir] :: LocalBlobStoreConfig -> Path
createBlobStore :: LocalBlobStoreConfig -> Task Text BlobStore
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.FileUpload.BlobStore.Local.LocalBlobStoreConfig
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.FileUpload.BlobStore.Local.LocalBlobStoreConfig
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.FileUpload.BlobStore.Local.LocalBlobStoreConfig

module Service.Auth
data RequestContext
RequestContext :: Maybe UserClaims -> Map FileRef ResolvedFile -> Uuid -> DateTime -> Bool -> RequestContext
[user] :: RequestContext -> Maybe UserClaims
[files] :: RequestContext -> Map FileRef ResolvedFile
[requestId] :: RequestContext -> Uuid
[timestamp] :: RequestContext -> DateTime
[trustedBypass] :: RequestContext -> Bool
data UserClaims
UserClaims :: Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Array Text -> Maybe Text -> Map Text Value -> UserClaims
[sub] :: UserClaims -> Text
[email] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text
[name] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text
[permissions] :: UserClaims -> Array Text
[tenantId] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text
[rawClaims] :: UserClaims -> Map Text Value
emptyContext :: RequestContext
anonymousContext :: Task err RequestContext
authenticatedContext :: UserClaims -> Task err RequestContext
trustedContext :: Task err RequestContext
withFiles :: Map FileRef ResolvedFile -> RequestContext -> RequestContext
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.Auth.RequestContext
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Auth.RequestContext

module Service.Command.Core
class Command command where {
    -- | Whether this command supports multi-tenancy.
    --   
    --   When True, <a>getEntityIdImpl</a> and <a>decideImpl</a> receive a
    --   tenant UUID as first argument.
    type IsMultiTenant command :: Bool;
    type IsMultiTenant command = 'False;
}
getEntityIdImpl :: Command command => GetEntityIdFunction (IsMultiTenant command) command (EntityIdType (EntityOf command))
decideImpl :: Command command => DecideFunction (IsMultiTenant command) command (EntityOf command) (EventOf (EntityOf command))
canExecuteImpl :: Command command => Maybe UserClaims -> Maybe AccessError
data CommandResult event
AcceptCommand :: InsertionType -> Array event -> CommandResult event
RejectCommand :: Text -> CommandResult event
type family NameOf t :: Symbol
type family TransportsOf commandType :: [Type]
type family NamesOf (types :: [Type]) :: [Symbol]
type family AppendSymbols (xs :: [Symbol]) (ys :: [Symbol]) :: [Symbol]
class AllKnownSymbols (names :: [Symbol])
allSymbolTexts :: AllKnownSymbols names => Array Text
type family GetEntityIdFunction (isTenant :: Bool) command id
type family DecideFunction (isTenant :: Bool) command entity event
data SBool (b :: Bool)
[STrue] :: SBool 'True
[SFalse] :: SBool 'False
class KnownMultiTenant (b :: Bool)
sbool :: KnownMultiTenant b => SBool b
data RequestContext
RequestContext :: Maybe UserClaims -> Map FileRef ResolvedFile -> Uuid -> DateTime -> Bool -> RequestContext
[user] :: RequestContext -> Maybe UserClaims
[files] :: RequestContext -> Map FileRef ResolvedFile
[requestId] :: RequestContext -> Uuid
[timestamp] :: RequestContext -> DateTime
[trustedBypass] :: RequestContext -> Bool
data UserClaims
UserClaims :: Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Text -> Array Text -> Maybe Text -> Map Text Value -> UserClaims
[sub] :: UserClaims -> Text
[email] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text
[name] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text
[permissions] :: UserClaims -> Array Text
[tenantId] :: UserClaims -> Maybe Text
[rawClaims] :: UserClaims -> Map Text Value
data AccessError
class Entity entity where {
    -- | The type of identifier used for this entity.
    --   
    --   Defaults to <a>Uuid</a> but can be overridden for entities that use
    --   different ID types.
    type EntityIdType entity;
    type EntityIdType entity = Uuid;
}
initialStateImpl :: Entity entity => entity
updateImpl :: Entity entity => EventOf entity -> entity -> entity
class Event event
getEventEntityIdImpl :: Event event => event -> EntityIdType (EntityOf event)
type family EntityOf command
type family EventOf entityType
data Decision a
[Return] :: forall a. a -> Decision a
[Bind] :: forall a1 a. Decision a1 -> (a1 -> Decision a) -> Decision a
[GenUuid] :: Decision Uuid
[Accept] :: forall a. InsertionType -> Array a -> Decision a
[Reject] :: forall a. Text -> Decision a
data DecisionContext
DecisionContext :: Task Text Uuid -> DecisionContext
[genUuid] :: DecisionContext -> Task Text Uuid
runDecision :: HasCallStack => DecisionContext -> Decision a -> Task Text (CommandResult a)
instance (GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol name, Service.Command.Core.AllKnownSymbols rest) => Service.Command.Core.AllKnownSymbols (name : rest)
instance Service.Command.Core.AllKnownSymbols '[]
instance Service.Command.Core.KnownMultiTenant 'GHC.Types.False
instance Service.Command.Core.KnownMultiTenant 'GHC.Types.True

module Service.Transport.Internal
data InternalTransport
InternalTransport :: InternalTransport
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Transport.Internal.InternalTransport
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Transport.Internal.InternalTransport

module Service.Command

module Service.CommandExecutor.Core
data CommandExecutor event
CommandExecutor :: EventStore event -> Int -> Int -> CommandExecutor event
[eventStore] :: CommandExecutor event -> EventStore event
[maxRetries] :: CommandExecutor event -> Int
[retryDelayMs] :: CommandExecutor event -> Int
data ExecutionResult
CommandAccepted :: StreamId -> Int -> Int -> ExecutionResult
[streamId] :: ExecutionResult -> StreamId
[eventsAppended] :: ExecutionResult -> Int
[retriesAttempted] :: ExecutionResult -> Int
CommandRejected :: Text -> ExecutionResult
[reason] :: ExecutionResult -> Text
CommandFailed :: Text -> Int -> ExecutionResult
[error] :: ExecutionResult -> Text
[retriesAttempted] :: ExecutionResult -> Int
CommandUnauthorized :: AccessError -> ExecutionResult
[authError] :: ExecutionResult -> AccessError
execute :: (Command command, commandEntity ~ EntityOf command, commandEvent ~ EventOf commandEntity, commandEntity ~ EntityOf commandEvent, Event commandEvent, Entity commandEntity, ToStreamId (EntityIdType commandEntity), Eq (EntityIdType commandEntity), Show (EntityIdType commandEntity), Show commandEvent, KnownSymbol (NameOf command), KnownMultiTenant (IsMultiTenant command)) => EventStore commandEvent -> EntityFetcher commandEntity commandEvent -> EntityName -> RequestContext -> command -> Task Text ExecutionResult
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.CommandExecutor.Core.ExecutionResult
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Service.CommandExecutor.Core.CommandExecutor event)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.CommandExecutor.Core.ExecutionResult
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Service.CommandExecutor.Core.ExecutionResult
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.CommandExecutor.Core.ExecutionResult
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Service.CommandExecutor.Core.ExecutionResult

module Service.Response
data CommandResponse
Accepted :: Text -> CommandResponse
[entityId] :: CommandResponse -> Text
Rejected :: Text -> CommandResponse
[reason] :: CommandResponse -> Text
Failed :: Text -> CommandResponse
[error] :: CommandResponse -> Text
Unauthorized :: AccessError -> CommandResponse
[authError] :: CommandResponse -> AccessError
fromExecutionResult :: ExecutionResult -> CommandResponse
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Response.CommandResponse
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Service.Response.CommandResponse
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.Response.CommandResponse
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Service.Response.CommandResponse
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Response.CommandResponse
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Service.Response.CommandResponse

module Service.Transport.Mcp.Response
toCallToolResult :: CommandResponse -> Value
toResourceContent :: Text -> Text -> Value

module Service.Transport.Cli.Output
data OutputFormat
JsonOutput :: OutputFormat
PrettyOutput :: OutputFormat
QuietOutput :: OutputFormat
formatResponse :: OutputFormat -> CommandResponse -> Text
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Transport.Cli.Output.OutputFormat
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Transport.Cli.Output.OutputFormat

module Service.Transport
class Transport transport where {
    -- | The request type for this transport.
    type Request transport;
    -- | The response type for this transport.
    type Response transport;
    -- | The assembled, runnable representation of this transport.
    type RunnableTransport transport;
}
assembleTransport :: Transport transport => Endpoints transport -> RunnableTransport transport
runTransport :: Transport transport => transport -> RunnableTransport transport -> Task Text Unit
buildHandler :: forall command (name :: Symbol). (Transport transport, Command command, FromJSON command, name ~ NameOf command, KnownSymbol name) => transport -> Proxy command -> (RequestContext -> command -> Task Text CommandResponse) -> EndpointHandler
type EndpointHandler = RequestContext -> Bytes -> (CommandResponse, Bytes) -> Task Text Unit -> Task Text Unit
type QueryEndpointHandler = Maybe UserClaims -> Maybe Expr -> QueryPageRequest -> Task QueryEndpointError Text
data Endpoints transport
Endpoints :: transport -> Map Text EndpointHandler -> Map Text QueryEndpointHandler -> Map Text EndpointSchema -> Map Text EndpointSchema -> Endpoints transport
[transport] :: Endpoints transport -> transport
[commandEndpoints] :: Endpoints transport -> Map Text EndpointHandler
[queryEndpoints] :: Endpoints transport -> Map Text QueryEndpointHandler
[commandSchemas] :: Endpoints transport -> Map Text EndpointSchema
[querySchemas] :: Endpoints transport -> Map Text EndpointSchema
data EndpointSchema
EndpointSchema :: Maybe Schema -> Schema -> Text -> Bool -> Maybe Text -> EndpointSchema
[requestSchema] :: EndpointSchema -> Maybe Schema
[responseSchema] :: EndpointSchema -> Schema
[description] :: EndpointSchema -> Text
[deprecated] :: EndpointSchema -> Bool
[entityName] :: EndpointSchema -> Maybe Text
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Transport.EndpointSchema
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Transport.EndpointSchema

module Service.Transport.Web.BuiltinSchemas
oauth2EndpointSchemas :: Bool -> Map Text EndpointSchema
fileUploadEndpointSchemas :: Bool -> Map Text EndpointSchema

module Service.Transport.Mcp.Protocol
data ServerState
ServerState :: ConcurrentVar Bool -> ConcurrentVar Bool -> Text -> Text -> Map Text EndpointHandler -> Map Text QueryEndpointHandler -> Value -> Value -> ServerState
[initReceived] :: ServerState -> ConcurrentVar Bool
[initialized] :: ServerState -> ConcurrentVar Bool
[serverName] :: ServerState -> Text
[serverVersion] :: ServerState -> Text
[commandEndpoints] :: ServerState -> Map Text EndpointHandler
[queryEndpoints] :: ServerState -> Map Text QueryEndpointHandler
[cachedToolsList] :: ServerState -> Value
[cachedResourcesList] :: ServerState -> Value
newServerState :: Text -> Text -> Map Text EndpointHandler -> Map Text QueryEndpointHandler -> Map Text EndpointSchema -> Map Text EndpointSchema -> Task Text ServerState
handleRequest :: ServerState -> JsonRpcRequest -> Task Text (Maybe JsonRpcResponse)

module Service.Query.Definition
data QueryDefinition
QueryDefinition :: Text -> Schema -> (EventStore Value -> Task Text (QueryRegistry, (Text, QueryEndpointHandler, EndpointSchema))) -> QueryDefinition
[queryName] :: QueryDefinition -> Text
[querySchema] :: QueryDefinition -> Schema
[wireQuery] :: QueryDefinition -> EventStore Value -> Task Text (QueryRegistry, (Text, QueryEndpointHandler, EndpointSchema))
createDefinition :: forall query (queryName :: Symbol) (entities :: [Type]). (Query query, ToSchema query, ToJSON query, FromJSON query, queryName ~ NameOf query, entities ~ EntitiesOf query, KnownSymbol queryName, WireEntities entities query) => QueryDefinition
createDefinitionWithStore :: forall query (queryName :: Symbol) (entities :: [Type]). (Query query, ToSchema query, ToJSON query, FromJSON query, queryName ~ NameOf query, entities ~ EntitiesOf query, KnownSymbol queryName, WireEntities entities query) => Task Text (QueryObjectStore query) -> QueryDefinition
class WireEntities (entities :: [Type]) query
wireEntities :: WireEntities entities query => Text -> EventStore Value -> QueryObjectStore query -> Task Text QueryRegistry
instance (Service.Entity.Core.Entity entity, Service.Query.Core.Query query, Service.Query.Core.QueryOf entity query, Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON (Service.Entity.Core.EventOf entity), Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON (Service.Entity.Core.EventOf entity), GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf entity), Service.Query.Definition.WireEntities rest query) => Service.Query.Definition.WireEntities (entity : rest) query
instance Service.Query.Definition.WireEntities '[] query

module Service.CommandExecutor

module Service.ServiceDefinition.Core
data Service (commandRow :: Row Type) (commandTransportNames :: [Symbol])
new :: Service ('[] :: [Pair Symbol Type]) ('[] :: [Symbol])
command :: forall cmd (originalCommands :: Row Type) (commandName :: Symbol) (commandTransports :: [Type]) (transportNames :: [Symbol]) (commandTransportNames :: [Symbol]) event entity (entityName :: Symbol) entityIdType. (Command cmd, ToSchema cmd, commandName ~ NameOf cmd, commandTransports ~ TransportsOf cmd, transportNames ~ NamesOf (PublicTransports commandTransports), AllKnownSymbols transportNames, BuildHandlersForTransports (PublicTransports commandTransports), entityName ~ NameOf entity, KnownSymbol commandName, KnownSymbol entityName, KnownHash commandName, entity ~ EntityOf cmd, event ~ EventOf entity, FromJSON event, ToJSON event, CommandInspect (CommandDefinition commandName commandTransports cmd transportNames event entity entityName entityIdType)) => Service originalCommands commandTransportNames -> Service ((commandName ':= CommandDefinition commandName commandTransports cmd transportNames event entity entityName entityIdType) ': originalCommands) (AppendSymbols transportNames commandTransportNames)
toServiceRunner :: forall (cmds :: Row Type) (commandTransportNames :: [Symbol]) event entity. (event ~ ServiceEventType cmds, entity ~ ServiceEntityType cmds, FromJSON event, ToJSON event, FromJSON entity, ToJSON entity, KnownSymbol (NameOf entity)) => Service cmds commandTransportNames -> ServiceRunner
data ServiceRunner
ServiceRunner :: (EventStore Value -> Map Text TransportValue -> Task Text (Map Text (Map Text EndpointHandler), Map Text (Map Text EndpointSchema), Map Text EndpointHandler)) -> ServiceRunner
[getEndpointsByTransport] :: ServiceRunner -> EventStore Value -> Map Text TransportValue -> Task Text (Map Text (Map Text EndpointHandler), Map Text (Map Text EndpointSchema), Map Text EndpointHandler)
data TransportValue
TransportValue :: transport -> TransportValue
type family ServiceEventType (cmds :: Row Type)
type family ServiceEntityType (cmds :: Row Type)
instance (Service.Transport.Transport transport, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf transport), Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.BuildHandlersForTransports rest) => Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.BuildHandlersForTransports (transport : rest)
instance Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.BuildHandlersForTransports '[]
instance (Service.Command.Core.Command cmd, Service.Entity.Core.Entity entity, Service.Entity.Core.Event event, event GHC.Types.~ Service.Entity.Core.EventOf entity, entity GHC.Types.~ Service.Entity.Core.EntityOf cmd, entity GHC.Types.~ Service.Entity.Core.EntityOf event, entityIdType GHC.Types.~ Service.Entity.Core.EntityIdType entity, Service.Event.StreamId.ToStreamId entityIdType, GHC.Classes.Eq entityIdType, GHC.Classes.Ord entityIdType, GHC.Show.Show entityIdType, GHC.Show.Show event, Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON cmd, Schema.ToSchema cmd, Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.BuildHandlersForTransports (Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.PublicTransports transports), Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.KnownBool (Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.IncludesInternalTransport transports), Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.AssertNoMixedTransports transports, Service.Command.Core.AllKnownSymbols transportNames, name GHC.Types.~ Service.Command.Core.NameOf cmd, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol name, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol entityName, Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON event, Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON event, Service.Command.Core.KnownMultiTenant (Service.Command.Core.IsMultiTenant cmd), Data.Record.Anon.Plugin.Internal.Runtime.KnownHash name) => Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.CommandInspect (Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.CommandDefinition name transports cmd transportNames event entity entityName entityIdType)
instance Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.KnownBool 'GHC.Types.False
instance Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.KnownBool 'GHC.Types.True
instance GHC.Show.Show (Service.ServiceDefinition.Core.CommandDefinition name transports cmd transportNames event entity entityName entityIdType)

module Service.ServiceDefinition

module Service

module Integration
data Outbound
data Action
data ActionContext
ActionContext :: SecretStore -> ImmutableProviderRegistry -> ConcurrentMap Text Lock -> Maybe FileAccessContext -> DispatchRegistry -> ActionContext
[secretStore] :: ActionContext -> SecretStore
[providerRegistry] :: ActionContext -> ImmutableProviderRegistry
[refreshLocks] :: ActionContext -> ConcurrentMap Text Lock
[fileAccess] :: ActionContext -> Maybe FileAccessContext
[outboundDispatch] :: ActionContext -> DispatchRegistry
data FileAccessContext
FileAccessContext :: (FileRef -> Task FileAccessError Bytes) -> (FileRef -> Task FileAccessError FileMetadata) -> FileAccessContext
[retrieveFile] :: FileAccessContext -> FileRef -> Task FileAccessError Bytes
[getFileMetadata] :: FileAccessContext -> FileRef -> Task FileAccessError FileMetadata
data ImmutableProviderRegistry
fromMap :: Map Text ValidatedOAuth2ProviderConfig -> ImmutableProviderRegistry
lookup :: Text -> ImmutableProviderRegistry -> Maybe ValidatedOAuth2ProviderConfig
entries :: ImmutableProviderRegistry -> Array (Text, ValidatedOAuth2ProviderConfig)
batch :: Array Action -> Outbound
none :: Outbound
outbound :: ToAction config => config -> Action
class ToAction config
toAction :: ToAction config => config -> Action
action :: (ActionContext -> Task IntegrationError (Maybe CommandPayload)) -> Action
emitCommand :: forall command (name :: Symbol). (ToJSON command, name ~ NameOf command, KnownSymbol name) => command -> Task IntegrationError (Maybe CommandPayload)
noCommand :: Task IntegrationError (Maybe CommandPayload)
makeCommandPayload :: forall command (name :: Symbol). (ToJSON command, name ~ NameOf command, KnownSymbol name) => command -> CommandPayload
encodeCommand :: forall command (name :: Symbol). (ToJSON command, name ~ NameOf command, KnownSymbol name) => command -> Text
newtype Inbound
Inbound :: InboundInternal -> Inbound
data InboundConfig command
InboundConfig :: ((command -> Task IntegrationError Unit) -> Task IntegrationError Unit) -> InboundConfig command
[run] :: InboundConfig command -> (command -> Task IntegrationError Unit) -> Task IntegrationError Unit
inbound :: forall command (name :: Symbol). (ToJSON command, name ~ NameOf command, KnownSymbol name) => InboundConfig command -> Inbound
data IntegrationError
NetworkError :: Text -> IntegrationError
AuthenticationError :: Text -> IntegrationError
ValidationError :: Text -> IntegrationError
RateLimited :: Int -> IntegrationError
PermanentFailure :: Text -> IntegrationError
UnexpectedError :: Text -> IntegrationError
data CommandPayload
CommandPayload :: Text -> Value -> CommandPayload
[commandType] :: CommandPayload -> Text
[commandData] :: CommandPayload -> Value
runAction :: ActionContext -> Action -> Task IntegrationError (Maybe CommandPayload)
getActions :: Outbound -> Array Action
runInbound :: Inbound -> (CommandPayload -> Task IntegrationError Unit) -> Task IntegrationError Unit
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.CommandPayload
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Integration.IntegrationError
instance Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON Integration.CommandPayload
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Integration.CommandPayload
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.CommandPayload
instance GHC.Show.Show Integration.IntegrationError
instance Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON Integration.CommandPayload

module Service.OutboundIntegration.Core
class OutboundIntegration handler where {
    -- | The event type this handler processes.
    --   
    --   Set by the TH macro to 'EventOf (EntityOf handler)' — the entity's
    --   full event ADT.
    type HandledEvent handler;
}
handleEventImpl :: OutboundIntegration handler => EntityOf handler -> HandledEvent handler -> Outbound

module Service.Integration.Types
data OutboundRunner
OutboundRunner :: Text -> (ActionContext -> EventStore Value -> Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)) -> OutboundRunner
[entityTypeName] :: OutboundRunner -> Text
[processEvent] :: OutboundRunner -> ActionContext -> EventStore Value -> Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)
data OutboundLifecycleRunner
OutboundLifecycleRunner :: Text -> (StreamId -> Task Text WorkerState) -> OutboundLifecycleRunner
[entityTypeName] :: OutboundLifecycleRunner -> Text
[spawnWorkerState] :: OutboundLifecycleRunner -> StreamId -> Task Text WorkerState
data WorkerState
WorkerState :: (Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)) -> Task Text Unit -> WorkerState
[processEvent] :: WorkerState -> Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)
[cleanup] :: WorkerState -> Task Text Unit

module Service.Integration.Dispatcher
data IntegrationDispatcher
data DispatcherConfig
DispatcherConfig :: Int -> Int -> Bool -> Int -> Int -> Maybe Int -> Int -> Int -> DispatcherConfig
[idleTimeoutMs] :: DispatcherConfig -> Int
[reaperIntervalMs] :: DispatcherConfig -> Int
[enableReaper] :: DispatcherConfig -> Bool
[workerChannelCapacity] :: DispatcherConfig -> Int
[channelWriteTimeoutMs] :: DispatcherConfig -> Int
[eventProcessingTimeoutMs] :: DispatcherConfig -> Maybe Int
[maxEventRetries] :: DispatcherConfig -> Int
[retryBaseDelayMs] :: DispatcherConfig -> Int
defaultConfig :: DispatcherConfig
data OutboundRunner
OutboundRunner :: Text -> (ActionContext -> EventStore Value -> Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)) -> OutboundRunner
[entityTypeName] :: OutboundRunner -> Text
[processEvent] :: OutboundRunner -> ActionContext -> EventStore Value -> Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)
data OutboundLifecycleRunner
OutboundLifecycleRunner :: Text -> (StreamId -> Task Text WorkerState) -> OutboundLifecycleRunner
[entityTypeName] :: OutboundLifecycleRunner -> Text
[spawnWorkerState] :: OutboundLifecycleRunner -> StreamId -> Task Text WorkerState
data WorkerState
WorkerState :: (Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)) -> Task Text Unit -> WorkerState
[processEvent] :: WorkerState -> Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)
[cleanup] :: WorkerState -> Task Text Unit
new :: EventStore Value -> Array OutboundRunner -> Map Text EndpointHandler -> Task Text IntegrationDispatcher
newWithLifecycle :: EventStore Value -> Array OutboundRunner -> Array OutboundLifecycleRunner -> Map Text EndpointHandler -> Task Text IntegrationDispatcher
newWithLifecycleConfig :: DispatcherConfig -> EventStore Value -> Array OutboundRunner -> Array OutboundLifecycleRunner -> Map Text EndpointHandler -> ActionContext -> Task Text IntegrationDispatcher
dispatch :: IntegrationDispatcher -> Event Value -> Task Text Unit
shutdown :: IntegrationDispatcher -> Task Text Unit
dispatchCommand :: Map Text EndpointHandler -> CommandPayload -> Task Text Unit
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Integration.Dispatcher.WorkerStatus
instance GHC.Show.Show value => GHC.Show.Show (Service.Integration.Dispatcher.WorkerMessage value)
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Integration.Dispatcher.WorkerStatus

module Integration.Timer
data Every command
Every :: Interval -> (Int -> command) -> Every command
[interval] :: Every command -> Interval
[toCommand] :: Every command -> Int -> command
every :: (ToJSON command, KnownSymbol (NameOf command)) => Every command -> Inbound
type Interval = Int
seconds :: Int -> Interval
minutes :: Int -> Interval
hours :: Int -> Interval

module Integration.Lifecycle
data OutboundConfig state
OutboundConfig :: (StreamId -> Task Text state) -> (state -> Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)) -> (state -> Task Text Unit) -> OutboundConfig state
[initialize] :: OutboundConfig state -> StreamId -> Task Text state
[processEvent] :: OutboundConfig state -> state -> Event Value -> Task Text (Array CommandPayload)
[cleanup] :: OutboundConfig state -> state -> Task Text Unit

module Service.Application.Integrations
withOutboundLifecycle :: Inspectable entity => OutboundConfig state -> (Array OutboundRunner, Array OutboundLifecycleRunner, Array Inbound) -> (Array OutboundRunner, Array OutboundLifecycleRunner, Array Inbound)
withInbound :: Inbound -> (Array OutboundRunner, Array OutboundLifecycleRunner, Array Inbound) -> (Array OutboundRunner, Array OutboundLifecycleRunner, Array Inbound)
createTypedOutboundRunner :: (OutboundIntegration handler, entity ~ EntityOf handler, event ~ EventOf entity, event ~ HandledEvent handler, FromJSON entity, FromJSON event, Inspectable entity, Default entity, Entity entity) => OutboundRunner
createOutboundLifecycleRunner :: Inspectable entity => OutboundConfig state -> OutboundLifecycleRunner
startIntegrationSubscriber :: Maybe DispatcherConfig -> EventStore Value -> Array OutboundRunner -> Array OutboundLifecycleRunner -> Map Text EndpointHandler -> ActionContext -> Task Text (Maybe IntegrationDispatcher)
startInboundWorkers :: Array Inbound -> Map Text EndpointHandler -> Task Text (Array (AsyncTask Text Unit))

module Integration.Exit
onEvent :: entity -> event -> Outbound
instance Integration.ToAction Integration.Exit.ExitAction

module Integration.Command
data Emit command
Emit :: command -> Emit command
[command] :: Emit command -> command
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Integration.Command.Emit command)
instance (Data.Aeson.Types.ToJSON.ToJSON command, GHC.TypeLits.KnownSymbol (Service.Command.Core.NameOf command)) => Integration.ToAction (Integration.Command.Emit command)

module Service.TH.Boilerplate

module Service.Query.TH

module Service.Infra.Postgres.ConnectionConfig
data SslMode
SslModeUnset :: SslMode
SslModeDisable :: SslMode
SslModeAllow :: SslMode
SslModePrefer :: SslMode
SslModeRequire :: SslMode
SslModeVerifyCa :: SslMode
SslModeVerifyFull :: SslMode
data ConnectionParams
ConnectionParams :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Text -> Int -> SslMode -> Maybe Text -> ConnectionParams
[host] :: ConnectionParams -> Text
[databaseName] :: ConnectionParams -> Text
[user] :: ConnectionParams -> Text
[password] :: ConnectionParams -> Text
[port] :: ConnectionParams -> Int
[sslMode] :: ConnectionParams -> SslMode
[sslRootCert] :: ConnectionParams -> Maybe Text
data ResolvedParams
ResolvedParams :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Text -> Word16 -> Text -> Text -> Text -> Text -> SslMode -> Maybe Text -> ResolvedParams
[host] :: ResolvedParams -> Text
[databaseName] :: ResolvedParams -> Text
[user] :: ResolvedParams -> Text
[password] :: ResolvedParams -> Text
[port] :: ResolvedParams -> Word16
[keepalives] :: ResolvedParams -> Text
[keepalivesIdle] :: ResolvedParams -> Text
[keepalivesInterval] :: ResolvedParams -> Text
[keepalivesCount] :: ResolvedParams -> Text
[sslMode] :: ResolvedParams -> SslMode
[sslRootCert] :: ResolvedParams -> Maybe Text
validatePort :: Int -> Result Text Word16
sslModeToText :: SslMode -> Maybe Text
textToSslMode :: Text -> Result Text SslMode
resolveParams :: ConnectionParams -> Result Text ResolvedParams
toParamPairs :: ConnectionParams -> Result Text (LinkedList (Text, Text))
toConnectionParams :: ConnectionParams -> Result Text (LinkedList Setting)
toPoolConfig :: Int -> LinkedList Setting -> Config
logPoolObservation :: Observation -> IO ()
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Infra.Postgres.ConnectionConfig.ConnectionParams
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Infra.Postgres.ConnectionConfig.ResolvedParams
instance GHC.Classes.Ord Service.Infra.Postgres.ConnectionConfig.ConnectionParams

module Service.QueryObjectStore.Postgres
data PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig
PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig :: Text -> Text -> Text -> Text -> Int -> Int -> SslMode -> Maybe Text -> PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig
[host] :: PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> Text
[databaseName] :: PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> Text
[user] :: PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> Text
[password] :: PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> Text
[port] :: PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> Int
[poolSize] :: PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> Int
[sslMode] :: PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> SslMode
[sslRootCert] :: PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> Maybe Text
data QueryObjectStoreError
ConnectionFailed :: Text -> QueryObjectStoreError
StatementFailed :: Text -> QueryObjectStoreError
DecodingFailed :: Text -> QueryObjectStoreError
data CheckpointStore
CheckpointStore :: (Text -> Text -> Task QueryObjectStoreError (Maybe Int64)) -> (Text -> Text -> Task QueryObjectStoreError Unit) -> (Text -> Text -> Int64 -> Task QueryObjectStoreError Unit) -> CheckpointStore
[resumeFromCheckpoint] :: CheckpointStore -> Text -> Text -> Task QueryObjectStoreError (Maybe Int64)
[deleteStaleHash] :: CheckpointStore -> Text -> Text -> Task QueryObjectStoreError Unit
[writeCheckpoint] :: CheckpointStore -> Text -> Text -> Int64 -> Task QueryObjectStoreError Unit
newFromConfig :: (FromJSON query, ToJSON query) => PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig -> Task QueryObjectStoreError (QueryObjectStore query)
createCheckpointStore :: Pool -> CheckpointStore
instance Data.Default.Internal.Default Service.QueryObjectStore.Postgres.PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.QueryObjectStore.Postgres.PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.QueryObjectStore.Postgres.QueryObjectStoreError
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.QueryObjectStore.Postgres.QueryObjectStoreError
instance Service.QueryObjectStore.Core.QueryObjectStoreConfig Service.QueryObjectStore.Postgres.PostgresQueryObjectStoreConfig
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.QueryObjectStore.Postgres.QueryObjectStoreError

module Service.Query.Subscriber
data QuerySubscriber
QuerySubscriber :: EventStore Value -> QueryRegistry -> ConcurrentVar (Maybe StreamPosition) -> ConcurrentVar (Maybe SubscriptionId) -> ConcurrentVar (Map Text Readiness) -> Maybe (QueryObjectStore Value) -> Maybe CheckpointStore -> QuerySubscriber
[eventStore] :: QuerySubscriber -> EventStore Value
[registry] :: QuerySubscriber -> QueryRegistry
[lastProcessedPosition] :: QuerySubscriber -> ConcurrentVar (Maybe StreamPosition)
[subscriptionId] :: QuerySubscriber -> ConcurrentVar (Maybe SubscriptionId)
[queryReadiness] :: QuerySubscriber -> ConcurrentVar (Map Text Readiness)
[objectStore] :: QuerySubscriber -> Maybe (QueryObjectStore Value)
[checkpointStore] :: QuerySubscriber -> Maybe CheckpointStore
data Readiness
Rebuilding :: Readiness
Ready :: Readiness
Failed :: Text -> Readiness
data RebuildOptions
RebuildOptions :: Int -> Int -> Bool -> Bool -> RebuildOptions
[chunkSize] :: RebuildOptions -> Int
[timeout] :: RebuildOptions -> Int
[logProgress] :: RebuildOptions -> Bool
[deleteStaleHashFirst] :: RebuildOptions -> Bool
data QueryRebuildError
RebuildTimeout :: Text -> QueryRebuildError
UpdaterException :: Text -> QueryRebuildError
HashMismatchReplay :: Text -> QueryRebuildError
CheckpointFetchFailed :: Text -> QueryRebuildError
CheckpointWriteFailed :: Text -> QueryRebuildError
EventStoreFailed :: Text -> QueryRebuildError
new :: EventStore Value -> QueryRegistry -> Task Text QuerySubscriber
newWithStore :: EventStore Value -> QueryRegistry -> QueryObjectStore Value -> Task Text QuerySubscriber
newWithCheckpointStore :: EventStore Value -> QueryRegistry -> CheckpointStore -> Task Text QuerySubscriber
start :: QuerySubscriber -> Task Text Unit
stop :: QuerySubscriber -> Task Text Unit
rebuildAll :: QuerySubscriber -> Task Text Unit
rebuildFrom :: QuerySubscriber -> Text -> StreamPosition -> RebuildOptions -> Task QueryRebuildError Unit
rebuildAllAsync :: QuerySubscriber -> RebuildOptions -> Task QueryRebuildError Unit
readinessOf :: QuerySubscriber -> Task Text Readiness
readinessOfQuery :: QuerySubscriber -> Text -> Task Text (Maybe Readiness)
rebuildOptionsDefault :: RebuildOptions
queryHashFor :: Text -> Text
processEventHandler :: QuerySubscriber -> Event Value -> Task Text Unit
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Query.Subscriber.QueryRebuildError
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Query.Subscriber.Readiness
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.Query.Subscriber.RebuildOptions
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.Query.Subscriber.QueryRebuildError
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Service.Query.Subscriber.Readiness
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Query.Subscriber.QueryRebuildError
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Query.Subscriber.Readiness
instance GHC.Show.Show Service.Query.Subscriber.RebuildOptions

module Service.EventStore.Simple

[basePath] :: SimpleEventStore -> Path
[persistent] :: SimpleEventStore -> Bool
new :: SimpleEventStore -> Task Text (EventStore Value)
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.EventStore.Simple.SimpleEventStore
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Service.EventStore.Simple.SubscriptionType
